caption: A man sits in a studio setting, wearing a black t-shirt that says "CHECK THE" and a black baseball cap with a winged logo. He is wearing gold jewelry, including a necklace and bracelets on both wrists. A professional microphone is positioned in front of him. In the background, white walls feature text and logos, including "HUSTLE" and "BOSS TALK 101". On-screen graphics include a "BOSS TALK PODCAST" logo in the bottom left and "BOSS TALK 101" in the bottom right. Throughout the sequence, the man is wearing headphones; he begins by adjusting the earcups with both hands, then lowers his arms while speaking, and finally raises his hands again, gesturing near his head. His facial expression remains animated and focused as he speaks into the microphone.
